title: ranunculus lejospermus
intro: Ranunculus lejospermus, also known as the Lesser Spearwort, is a plant species that belongs to the buttercup family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus lejospermus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to act as an antiseptic and wound healer. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
